mission

The Pentagon

The first Episode 2 main mission inside the besieged Pentagon, where Agents investigate Black Tusk's search for strategic resources.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Black Tusk objective

Agents enter a storm-damaged Pentagon to learn what Black Tusk is seeking and prevent the faction from converting the site's strategic resources into an advantage over SHD. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Pentagon is one of two Episode 2 main missions following an introductory Pentagon Breach mission. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk places the Pentagon under siege and becomes the first outside force to enter after its post-outbreak lockdown. [1]

  3. confirmed

    The wider Episode 2 operation has Agents secure a perfusion bioreactor needed for antiviral production. [2]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: The Pentagon & DARPA Research Labs — Ubisoft (2019-10-22). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Pentagon Breach is acknowledged but will receive its own record only after direct objective capture.
